# Bad Project Rules
## Setup
To get started run: cat ~/project/package.json
Also inspect: cat ~/project/src/index.js
## Checklist
- [ ] Write the feature
- [ ] Add unit tests
- [ ] Update documentation
- [ ] Run linter
- [ ] Fix linter errors
- [ ] Review with team
- [ ] Deploy to staging
